name: knowledge-base-maintenance
description: Capture project learnings, maintain decision logs, organize documentation, and build institutional knowledge from project activities
objectives: Capture decisions, rationale, and context from project activities
Maintain a decision log linking decisions to outcomes
Extract lessons learned from completed milestones and retros
Build searchable knowledge base from recurring patterns
Surface relevant past decisions when similar situations arise
prerequisites: Project history with decisions and outcomes available
Meeting notes and action item records

procedure.description: Extract and log decisions from project activities
commands: SCAN meeting summaries for decisions made
EXTRACT decision context: what was decided, why, who, when
DOCUMENT alternatives considered and reasons for rejection
LINK decisions to relevant tasks, requirements, or risks
TAG decisions by category (technical, process, scope, resource)
procedure.expectedOutput: Decision log entries with full context

commands: REVIEW completed milestones for what went well/poorly
IDENTIFY patterns in blockers and their resolutions
DOCUMENT estimation accuracy for future calibration
CAPTURE process improvements suggested by team
NOTE technical discoveries or gotchas encountered
procedure.expectedOutput: Lessons learned document with actionable takeaways

procedure.description: Ensure project documentation is organized and discoverable
commands: AUDIT existing documentation for completeness
IDENTIFY gaps: missing docs for key processes or decisions
ORGANIZE docs by category and lifecycle phase
ENSURE naming conventions are consistent
CREATE index or table of contents for project documentation

procedure.description: Identify recurring patterns for knowledge base
commands: ANALYZE past decisions for reusable patterns
DOCUMENT common risk-mitigation strategies that worked
CREATE templates from successful project artifacts
BUILD FAQ from recurring team questions
IDENTIFY anti-patterns to avoid in future projects
procedure.expectedOutput: Knowledge base entries with patterns and templates

procedure.description: Make knowledge base searchable and contextually relevant
commands: TAG knowledge entries with relevant keywords and domains
LINK related entries for cross-referencing
CREATE triggers for surfacing relevant knowledge
SET review schedule for keeping entries current
ARCHIVE outdated entries with historical notes
procedure.expectedOutput: Searchable knowledge base with retrieval triggers

criteria: Key decisions documented with context and rationale
Lessons learned captured at milestone boundaries
Knowledge base entries are accurate and current

testScenarios.test: Search for a past technical decision about authentication
testScenarios.expected: Decision found with context, alternatives, and outcome

testScenarios.test: New project encounters similar blocker to past project
testScenarios.expected: Relevant lesson surfaced with proven resolution

successIndicators: Team references knowledge base for past decisions
Recurring mistakes reduced due to documented lessons
Onboarding time reduced via accessible documentation

commonErrors.error: Decision context too sparse to be useful

commonErrors.solution: Apply archival policy, consolidate related entries

rollbackProcedure: SAVE entries as draft for review
FLAG low-confidence entries for human validation
escalationCriteria: Critical decision undocumented and context lost

successMetrics.name: Decision Documentation Rate
successMetrics.measurement: Key decisions documented vs total decisions made

successMetrics.name: Knowledge Reuse
successMetrics.measurement: Times knowledge base consulted for decisions

agentInterfaces.message: Store and organize knowledge base entries
Fetch project history for lessons learned extraction
